context7.description: Library documentation lookup - provides up-to-date docs for any npm package

docfork.description: MIT library documentation - alternative to Context7, no rate limits

sequential-thinking.description: Complex reasoning support - helps with multi-step problem solving

fetch.description: Web fetch - arbitrary HTTP GET/POST requests

qdrant-mcp.description: Vector search for architectural knowledge - requires Qdrant running

code-index-mcp.description: Deep code indexing and semantic search
